items.title: Spurs-Knicks Game 4 REACTIONS with Bobby Portis!
items.author: Run It Back on FanDuel TV
items.body_excerpt: On June 10, 2026 episode of 'Run It Back' on FanDuel TV, co-hosts Michelle Beadle, Boogie Cousins, Chandler Parsons, and Lou Williams react to the latest in NBA news & headlines! They are joined by Bucks forward Bobby Portis. And react to game 4 of NBA Finals New York Knicks vs…
